title: Ambient Sound Interval
description: Delay for an entity playing its sound

event_name.title: Event Name
event_name.description:
Level sound event to be played as the ambient sound.

Sample values:
• allay: ambient
• fox: sleep
• fox: screech

event_names.title: Event Names
event_names.description:
List of dynamic level sound events, with conditions for choosing between them. Evaluated in order, first one wins. If none evaluate to true, 'event_name' will take precedence.

Properties:
• condition (string)
• event_name (string)

Sample values:
• allay: [{"condition":"query.is_using_item","event_name...
• warden: [{"condition":"query.anger_level(this) >= 80","...

condition.title: Condition
condition.description: The condition that must be satisfied to select the given ambient sound

event_name.title: Event Name
event_name.description: Level sound event to be played as the ambient sound

range.title: Range
range.description:
Maximum time in seconds to randomly add to the ambient sound delay time.

Sample values:
• allay: 5
• fox: 160
• warden: 4

value.title: Value
value.description:
Minimum time in seconds before the entity plays its ambient sound again.

Sample values:
• allay: 5
• fox: 80
• warden: 2
